title: xanthophyllum philippinense
intro: Xanthophyllum philippinense is a species of plant in the family Polygalaceae, commonly known as the 'Philippine xanthophyllum' or 'yellow wood.' The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum philippinense include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant involve brewing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, which is then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
